## mainnet variable

Connect to the mainnet rpc and indexer

**Signature:**

```typescript
mainnet: <MS extends MetadataStorage<{
    __meta: "markets";
    slug: string;
    description: string;
    question: string;
    tags?: string[] | undefined;
    confidentialId?: string | undefined;
    img?: string | undefined;

    categories?: {

        img?: string | undefined;
        ticker?: string | undefined;

}, CommentMetadata>>() => FullConfig<MS>
```
